name: Karateka
description: Karateka is a side-scrolling martial arts game set in feudal Japan. The player controls a Karateka attempting to rescue Princess Mariko from the evil warlord Akuma. The game world is presented as a series of interconnected static screens. The Karateka moves from screen to screen, encountering enemies along the way. Combat is a core mechanic; the player faces various guards with differing fighting styles and aggression levels. The Karateka's health is represented by a depleting health bar. Health can be partially recovered by sheathing the Karateka's weapon and meditating - however, the Karateka is defenseless in this state. The story unfolds through environmental storytelling and cutscenes depicting Akuma and Mariko. Successfully navigating all obstacles and defeating Akuma will result in the rescue of Princess Mariko. However, if the player approaches the princess with weapons drawn, she may misinterpret your intentions and you will have to approach her again with the Karateka in a peaceful stance to complete the game correctly.

controls.arrow_up: Move forward; initiate running when held down in a peaceful stance.
controls.arrow_down: Sheathe weapon to assume a peaceful stance; meditate while sheathed to recover health.
controls.arrow_right: Move forward; initiate running when held down in a peaceful stance.
